subcodes.first_line: A remembrance hath streamed forth from My Pen, and We make mention of all who have turned unto My countenance, drawn nigh unto Mine horizon, and quaffed from the Kawthar of My bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری ظهر من قلمی و نذکر کل من توجه الی وجهی و اقبل الی افقی و شرب کوثر عطائی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital
